titleStmt.title: SII 9.620: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 620. (A.R. No. 394 of 1927.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A HOUSE-SITE TO THE SOUTH OF HALAVANAKERE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Kārtika, śu, 1 corresponding to A.D. 1546 October 25, Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya. It records that, when Achcha-Voḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the king, Santāna-Śaṅkaraliṅgaseṭṭi had built a charity-house and granted certain lands and a tank for the worship of the god Viṭhaladēva and when in the course of time the charity-house had fallen down, Kuppaṇaseṭṭi-Udare-Sūriseṭṭi got it restored and endowed it with land and money. It also registers other grants made by some others for properly conducting the same charity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ)namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyāeṁnamaḥ . śrīgurubhyō(ṁ) namaḥ nirvighnamastu namastuṁgaśira
ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1468 saṁdu vartamāna parābhavasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 1 dalū śrīmadrājādhirāja
(rāja) rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivamahārāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhvāsanadalū cittayisi sakala sāṁbrā
jyavanu pratipālisuttiha kāladalū Avara nirūpadiṁda Accavoḍeyarū bārakūra rā
jyavanāḷuva kāladali modalu Atimarana baḷiya saṁtāna saṁkaraseṭi maṭhava kaṭisi viṭhaladēvarige
mūlada saṁkaraguṁpaḷiya kayyali koṁḍa bā[ḷu Ā]nagaḷiyavoḷage mūḍalu guṁmanāyakittiya mūlada gaḍiyi
ṁ paḍuvalu taṁ . madeyaseṭṭiya makkaḷu mēlāḍiya kaḷagaḍiyiṁ ba . pa . hariseṭṭiya basavaseṭṭi
ya mūlada gaḍiyiṁ mū . ba . sabaḷa cakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ taṁkalu nāghaṁ mū 2 mattamaṁ mūḍa
Aṁṇakoṁgara māṇiseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ pa . teṁ . dēvakaseṭitiya mitāṁtakaḷa gaḍi yiṁ ba . pa . mitāṁ
takaḷa gaḍi yiṁ mū . pa . sāliṁ teṁ nāghaṁ mū 1 teṁgina tōṭa keṟe saha teru kaḷaci Aki nā
gaṁḍugalu mu 10 mataṁ harunāḍa kaṁṇyanada voḷage bāgilu ko� geya vāsudēva
hebārana kayalu kupaṇaseṭi māṇi Aṁṇanavaru Aruvārava māḍikoṁḍa jaṁna sa
rvasada gaḍiya vivara bhāsena mana gadeyiṁ teṁ . mū . maṭhavina gadeyiṁ pa . teṁ . kaḻaniṁ
da ba . pa . gōrigadeyiṁ mū . yi nāku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage yiṁmaḍi gade mū 6 mataṁ he
bārati gade gaḍi vivara ba . kalaniṁda taṁ . mū . māvinahaḷiṁ paḍuva . teṁ . koṁḍala haḷiyiṁ .
pa . bauneḷiṁ mū . yiṁtī nāku gaḍivoḷage mu 4 kōṭapana gade mu 2 Adara mū
ḍaṇa huḷisegade mu 1 . 0 . bacalapāḍina toḷa mu 1 . Aṁtu nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 14 . 0 yidaroḷage
janada kāvina bāḷu mu 12 nu yiḷuhi teṟina bāḷu mu 2 . 0 tera tetu Urusaṁda lekadalu tetubaha
ru yi jaṁnake Uṁṭāda Uḍugare Uttara sīme sāmyavēnuṁṭadu saha biḍāruvārava biṭu bārakūru pa
rivartanege salu varaha ga 200 kuṁdige vara ga 10 hoḍakaṭage vara ga 10 mūlādige vara
ha ga 40 lābha Aki mu 4 meyisāla vara ga 40 yidake lābha Aki mu 4 Aṁtu varaha
ga 300 teru kaḷaci nāgaṁḍugadalu Aki mu 24 mataṁ kayi madavoḷage Aṇahegaḍe kupa
ṇaseṭiyu kōcalabaḷiya dēu Alaseya kayalu Āruvārava koṁḍa bāḷu huḷusega
de mu 1 . 0 baṁḍōdi gade 3 hāḷi mu . 0 kere baḍagaṇa hāḷi mu . 0 mane malagade
mu 3 maki mu 13 Aṁtu bayalu maki saha mu 21 . 0 hakalu haḍu Anubha [saha Ā]
ruvārake koṭa varaha ga 50 teru kaḷaci Aki nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 5 yī yeraḍu ba
ge Aki mu 29 ge muvara dha(ṁ)rma naḍeUdu saṁtāna saṁkaraseṭiya maṭha naṣṭa
vādare kupaṇaseṭiya Udareya sūriyaseṭiyū jī(ṁ)rnauddhāramāḍi dharma
ke biṭa bāḷu haṭiyaṁgaḍi voḷage kupaṇaseṭiya gaṇapaseṭi lōkaseṭiya kayali A
rdhādiya māḍikoṁḍa bāḷa gaḍiya vivara muḍalu dugaṇarsana Udinahaḷiyiṁ mu .
harida bacaliṁda ba . pa . kupaṇaseṭi gaḍi Ayivatu haneyiṁda mu . ba . beṭṭinagadeyi
ṁdaṁ teṁ . yīnāku gaḍivoḷage hērigade mu 4 malagade mu 1 . 0 matagade mu 1 . 0
teṁgina tōṭa Ardha mane kaṇa saha Ardha Ādiya koṁḍu koṭa varaha ga 45 �yo
kke teru kaḷaci Aki nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 10 mataṁ haṭiyaṁgaḍi voḷage ku
paṇaseṭi beṁmabaṁḍāri kayali Āruvārava māḍikoṁḍa bāḷu
bayalu toḷakeya gade mu 4 ... 0 beṭaneṁba gade mu 1 halasi
na gade mu 1 ... 0 kuṁbāragade mu . 0 meke mu 1 maki malagade
saha mu 3 Aṁtu nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 11 ... mane kaḷa Anu
bha saha biḍāruvārava biṭu tekoṁḍa varaha ga 150 kuṁdige varaha
ga 10 hoḍakaṭige varaha ga 10 mūlādi meyisāla va ga 30 kaṭi
da lābha Aki mu 1 dēvasva kaḷaci nāgaṁḍugadalu Aki mū 17

mataṁ haṭiyaṁgaḍiyoḷage kupaṇaseṭi Alugaḍadēvana maga saṁkuhaḍadē
vana kaya biḍāruvārava māḍikoṇḍu bayalu siriyaṇaneṁba gade nāvaṁ mu 1 . 0
yidanirisi tegedukoṁḍa vara ga 14 yībaḷi dēvasva māīladēvige battamu 1 ... 0 kaḷaci maṭha
ke nāgaṁḍugadalu Aki mu 2 . 0 Ubhayaṁ yeraḍu bage bāḷa mēle maṭhake naḍeva Akinā
gaṁḍugadalu mu 20 mataṁ haṭi kudurapaḍuva kumaravoḷage Aṁṇauḍupara kayali
paḍuvakēriya halaru Āruvārava māḍikoṁḍa sarvasada mēle kupaṇaseṭiya Ardhādiyāgi ko
ṭa varahā ga 163 yi varahage kaṭida lābha nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 3 . yī Akiyanu kupaṇase
ṭi kaṭisida maṭhake dha(ṁ)rmake biṭadu yī Akiyanu paḍuvakēriya halaru naḍesikoḍuvarū Ā
sarvasavanu halaru saṁkaraliṁgaseṭige nāyaru mūlava koṭṭaru yī Akiya saṁka
raliṁgaseṭi naḍasikoḍuvaṁtāgi halaru koṭa vokalu sātigēli maṭhake naḍaudu
mattaṁ sabilaḍiyoḷage kupaṇaseṭi viṣunāvaḍana maga śaṁkara nāḍanu Avana kiri
ya taṁde gōviṁdanāvaḍanu koṭa nāyara mula biḷumaramāḍaneṁba gade mu
ḍi 4 haṁgāragadeyeṁ muṁ 3 sālagade mu ... 0 malagade mu 1 . 0 Ubhaya
mu 10 maneṭhāu sa vāgi taṁma nāyara mula kupaṇaseṭige koṭu tegadu
koṁ vara ga 32 teru bāḷiyakēri hala ko Akki mu 2 . 0 kaḷaci mu 8 yi Aki
voḷage kupaṇaseṭi māraśami modayali biṭa dharma nāgaṁ mu 4 mataṁ
Udareya mogavaṇaseṭi maḍikoṁḍa Aṁtarāruvārada bāḷu Ātanaḷiya
Udare suriyaseṭi dharmake baṭa bāḷina vivara teṁka bayala voḷage baḍaba
ṭu gōviṁdahaṁmucumane bāḷu hagarugade mu 1 . 0 naligade mu 1 . 0 heṁ
gade voḍi mu . 5 kalanahaḷi mu . 5 nāyigade hāḷi mu . 5 hosagade hāḷi hane 5
siṁgāragade mu . 5 madamaḷahāḷi mu . 5 boḍuvahaḷi mu . 5 kaḷehaḷi mu . 5
hunuvalagade mu 1 . 0 me ke koṁḍe haḷi 2 ke muṁ 20 kurihaḷi mu . 5 māvina
gade mu ... 0 Ajararahaḷi mu . 5 mane malagade korakegade Ahaḷi saha mu 2 ha
ne 5 makki baṁkanahaḷi mu ... 0 huḷusahaṁ mucu maki mu ... 0 Ubhaya
bayalu meke maki saha navaṁda mu 13 ... 5 kūḍi hakalu Anubha saha
yirisi tegedukoṁḍa vara ga 60 teru devasa kaḷuci Aki nāgaṁḍugadalu
mu 10 Aṁtu Aki mu 116 yidaroḷage viṭhaladēvara dēvapuja sarvakā
lake mu 20 māṇihegaḍe kupaṇaseṭi māḍi dha(ṁ)rma yibarige kupaṇaseṭi
tānu māḍi dharma yēḷumaṁdige Udare sūriseṭi māḍi dharma vobarige
mataṁ tirumaladēvarige UdaThe sūriseṭi māḍi dharma herikudura hosa
kaḷi bāḷa mēle naḍava Akki mu 6 yidake kārtikamāsada sikharada huṁṇa
vege naḍava raṁgapūje 1 sivarātrege naḍava raṁgapūje 1 naḍau mādapa
mata viṭhaladēvara mūla bobariyana tōṭada gaḍi mūḍalu varadasaṭiya
tōṁṭada gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu tōṭa 1 mataṁ hāḷe kereya tōṁṭa mūḍalu
narenabaḷivara tōṭa paḍuvalu māriṭiya gaḍi baḍagalu teṁginatōṭa .
Digital edition of SII 9.620 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
